codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior blocking regression by forcing `MockAppStateProvider` remount on scenario changes (`key={scenario.id}` in `DemoScenarioPage`), which correctly re-seeds state from the new scenario. The added regression suite (`src/demo/__tests__/scenarioSwitch.test.tsx`) covers both navigation directions and would fail without the key, so it meaningfully pins the bug. Compared against the original failing commit, this change resolves stale-state carryover without altering the misc-bridge-hydrated-reset mutator semantics (clearCredentials/lockProfile/createSession behavior remains in `MockAppStateProvider`).

summary: Pass. I reviewed the fix feature transcript skeleton and both diffs (`misc-bridge-hydrated-reset` and this fix), and confirmed the remount-based change plus new scenario-switch regression tests adequately address the original failure.
